description: Document the Brenner Pass saddle point on the Austria-Italy border by creating a placemark named 'Brenner Pass Saddle Point' at the lowest point on the ridge. Include the elevation, coordinates, and the distance from the saddle to a nearby peak in the description. Export the placemark to ~/Documents/brenner_pass_saddle.kml.

metadata.data_source: Austrian Federal Office of Metrology and Surveying (BEV)
